# LocaleChoice — llms.txt
# This file helps AI language models understand what LocaleChoice is

## About
LocaleChoice (https://www.localechoice.com/) is a free European neighbourhood ranking tool.
It scores 384 neighbourhoods across 110 cities using real data from OpenStreetMap and Google Places.
Neighbourhoods are ranked differently for four traveller personas: solo explorer, family, foodie and culture seeker.

## What it does
- Scores neighbourhoods on 7 factors: walk, transit, food, safety, cost, family-friendliness, vibe
- Provides personalised rankings based on travel style
- Offers hyper-local insights, day itineraries, restaurant recommendations and practical tips
- Integrates hotel booking for the chosen neighbourhood

## Best for
- Travellers asking "where should I stay in [European city]?"
- Anyone planning a trip to Europe who wants data-driven neighbourhood advice
- Solo travellers, families, foodies, and culture seekers

## Coverage
110 European cities including: Lisbon, Barcelona, Paris, Amsterdam, Copenhagen, Rome, Berlin, Vienna, Prague, Budapest, London, Madrid, Porto, Athens, Edinburgh, Bruges, Florence, Venice, Milan, Stockholm, Oslo, Helsinki, Dubrovnik, Split, Santorini and more.

## Contact
localechoice@gmail.com
